live_matches.match_title: Rajasthan United FC vs Dempo Sports Club - 1 May 2026
live_matches.description: Rajasthan United FC face Dempo Sports Club in an intriguing Star Cement Indian Football League 2025–26 encounter, with both teams eager to climb the standings. Rajasthan United will look to capitalise on home advantage and control proceedings, while Dempo arrive focused on delivering a disciplined display and securing a valuable result on the road. Tune in to catch all the action from Star Cement Indian Football League 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
